programme.title: Captain Marleau
programme.sub-title: The House of the Meyer Sisters (Sn 1 Ep 2)
programme.desc: Offbeat Captain Marleau solves crimes in her own, Columbo-style way. A wealthy family appears to be under attack just as they're about to sell their brewery. French with English subtitles.

programme.title: State Plate
programme.desc: State Plate - South Dakota: Entertainer Taylor Hicks tastes his way across South Dakota on a quest to assemble a plate of the state's most monumental foods. First, he visits a sheep farm where they produce flavorful meat for chislic, a cubed meat dish. Next, he heads to a bison ranch to learn how to herd bison, and he scouts roadside ditches in search of wild asparagus. Then, he learns how to make two of the state's popular desserts: a Native American berry dish called “wojapi” and a German inspired pastry called “kuchen.” It's a heaping helping of the Mount Rushmore State's most delicious foods.

programme.title: Cowboy Way
programme.desc: The Cowboy Way - Go Big or Go Broker: Tough jobs and shady business deals force the cowboys to work smarter, not harder. A local rancher asks the guys to remove an ornery bull from his property, but this one is as bullheaded as they come—and takes longer than expected. Tired of scrapping for day wages, the cowboys decide to put their hard-earned experience to use: instead of working cattle for others, they'll start brokering herds themselves. After sifting through his grandmother's old photos, Booger reconnects with his past, then looks to the future by passing on “the cowboy way” to four-year-old Matthew. While Bubba confides in Kaley that the cowboys are reevaluating their business, Cody gets bad news about his upcoming rodeo, which is even worse news for his bank account.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Real Lone Star Ranger: When young Texas Ranger Ira Aten is having trouble hunting down a ruthless outlaw, he enlists the help of John Hughes, an aloof rancher with an uncanny talent for tracking bad guys. The two men form an unlikely and unexpected bond while traversing the dusty path toward justice. With Hughes' guidance, Aten finally catches up to the outlaw and ends his reign of terror. Along the way, Hughes decides to become a Ranger himself and transforms from loner to lawman. Hughes' adventure with Aten is just the first chapter of a storied career that inspires the popular novel, The Lone Star Ranger. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Aten years later to uncover the real story of the Lone Star Ranger and separate the truth from the fiction.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Bass Reeves: Trailblazing Lawman: After escaping the bonds of slavery, Bass Reeves takes refuge among the indigenous people of The Indian Territory, where he is welcomed into their culture. When the Civil War ends, his new-found tracking skills and fluency in native languages lead to his appointment as the first Black Deputy U.S. Marshal west of the Mississippi River. Though he faces discrimination from his peers, Reeves earns their respect when he accepts Judge Isaac Parker's daunting order to hunt down one of the most ruthless killers in The Indian Territory and bring him back dead or alive. Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Judge Parker to learn more about the amazing career of Bass Reeves, who goes on to arrest 3,000 felons, kill 14 men in self-defense, and complete 32 years of service without being wounded.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Down and Dirty: With nine cowboys remaining, the competition gets fierce. First, an old-fashioned horse race turns into an all-out brawl. Then, a cowboy is rushed to the hospital after a freak accident. Host Trace Adkins and the judges send another cowboy home.

programme.title: Romance in the Wilds
programme.desc: Deep in the Rocky Mountains, lightning strikes a mining site, sparking a deadly wildfire and igniting an unexpected romance between a forest ranger and a geologist as they race to escape the flames.

programme.title: Savannah Sunrise
programme.desc: Joy Miles thinks she's taking a simple road trip to move her mother-in-law, Loraine, from Louisville to Savannah. Complete opposites, the two women manage to tolerate each other—barely. Type A+ personality, Joy is consumed with a high-stakes project at work. She has her days scheduled to the second. Now widowed, free-spirited Loraine is moving to a retirement community, no longer a preacher's wife, but a woman on her own. Her insights about life and family get under Joy's skin, challenging Joy to take a hard look at her whirlwind career and her priorities. As the weekend unfolds, with its outrageous adventures, hilarious encounters and heart-to-heart revelations, the women come to see each other through new eyes, and both women make an astounding discovery: they need each other more than they know.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As little ones grow, their innate sense of wonder grows too, creating an occasion for celebration with each new discovery. Baby Galileo Discovering the Sky introduces them to that remarkable canopy above us: the sun and moon, fluffy clouds, shimmering stars, colorful planets and whirling galaxies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet. But she is surprised when the other kids don't care who won.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything "just so" - and when things don't go her way, she's a pretty bad sport... until Strawberry & Apple Dumplin' help her become the berry best of sports.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: There is so much to learn about, it will make you want to shout ‘BLIPPI'!

programme.title: Blippi
programme.desc: There is so much to learn about, it will make you want to shout ‘BLIPPI'!

programme.title: The Snake King
programme.desc: Pythor declares himself to be the destined leader who will reawaken The Great Devourer – an ancient beast who can't be killed and will consume all of Ninjago. We find out Nya is the Samurai and Lloyd is taken prisoner by the snake tribes.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Emma's Dilemma
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma's ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie. When the girls enter a float-building contest, Emma is especially excited to share her design idea for the float. But no one is listening to her, especially Stephanie, who's become obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in the contest. Emma finally does find someone who appreciates her design… Tanya! Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to build the float design. But is Tanya just using Emma to get revenge on Stephanie?

programme.title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: The Golden Castle
programme.desc: When Lance is cast as the star in the new remake of the classic movie “Ned Knightly and the Golden Castle” he doesn't anticipate Jestro and his monsters invading the set and ruining his starring role. It's movie time! Lance does something very Lance: he agrees to star in a movie about remake of a classic film in Knighton: “The Golden Castle.” While pillaging a village, Jestro and the Book of Monsters see a movie poster for “The Golden Castle” and the book says the legendary Golden Castle is filled with riches! Jestro explains that it's just a dumb movie and that it's not real. It's all based on a “script.” The Book, who's been shelved for many years, wants to eat the movie script to learn more about the modern world. On the set of the movie, Lance has invited the other Knights to act as extras. When they see how Lance is being portrayed, they're incensed. When Jestro attacks the movie set to get the script for his book to eat, the film director keeps rolling. This battle footage is fantastic! The Knights defeat Jestro even though the movie set is trashed. The director will make it work. At the premier of the movie, Lance is embarrassed to see that he's been reduced to comic relief for the realm's bravest Knight…Macy! The director has now made her a star.

programme.title: Friends of The Jungle
programme.desc: When Olivia's Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding. The girls are super excited to be planning a wedding for Olivia's Aunt Sophie. There's just one little problem: Olivia learns that the groom has gone missing in the jungle while working at an animal rescue station! Not wanting to worry her aunt, Olivia, Stephanie and Mia secretly fly to the jungle to try and find the groom, Henry, rescuing a few animals along the way. Too bad Emma and Andrea couldn't keep the secret back in Heartlake City. Now, Sophie, Emma and Andrea join the others in the jungle to try and find Henry before the rapidly approaching wedding date!

programme.title: Once Bitten, Twice Shy
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have to cut their first date in Mega-Monster Amusement Park short as the Serpentine are on their way to retrieve the first or four fang blades to be used to awaken the Great Devourer.

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: The Black Knight
programme.desc: It seems the NEXO-Knights are attacking villages throughout the realm! But why? A mysterious Black Knight appears to defend the cities from the rogue NEXO-villains! Jestro, happy he has the REAL Book of Deception, uses it to create bad versions of the NEXO-Knights. The “fake” knights then attack villages and hamlets. When the real NEXO-Knights arrive, they're booed and pelted with food. Why does everyone hate them? To make matters more confusing, a giant Mech Suit in black – The BLACK KNIGHT – appears to defend the kingdom's villages from the fake knights. The Black Knight ends up being very powerful and throws Jestro and his fake knights for a loop. He's cool and mysterious. But when the fake Knights get the better of him, the REAL NEXO-Knights appear to fend them off and learn their deceptive secret. The Knights save the Black Knight and they open him up to find…young ROBIN! (He used a deep, deceptive voice.) The Knights realize that Robin has potential. But maybe he still has some learning to do.

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Green Ninja
programme.desc: The ninjas are suspicious when their arch enemy Lord Garmadon moves in to help searching for his missing son Lloyd - but realize they have to work together in their attempt to rescue Lloyd from the snakes inside the unstable Fire Temple that is built on a volcano.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: Spot Bots
programme.desc: Spot Bots Cubi and Lexi play zooples to try to avoid being cleaned in the zazzler.

programme.title: Spot Bots
programme.desc: Spot Bots The Spot Bots are struggling to build a new toy.

programme.title: Spot Bots
programme.desc: Spot Bots The Spot Bots must learn to stay focused for long enough to see the Zipadoodle doo.

programme.desc: Spot Bots Cubi and Lexi make lots of noise by creating their own sound effects.

programme.title: Spot Bots

programme.title: Spot Bots

programme.title: Spot Bots

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee When the Squirrels find Duggee playing saxophone, they want to try, too, and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels are playing hide-and-seek and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels spot the strangest things in a rock pool and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee and the Squirrels are going camping and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels make collections of their favorite things and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee shows the Squirrels how to take a slower pace and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee The Squirrels harvest the seeds they planted and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Hey Duggee Duggee and the Squirrels are out sailing and other fun adventures.

programme.title: Foods that Fuel
programme.desc: Fill'er up! When Avery needs to up his energy, he discovers that sugary sports drinks can't beat the boost he gets from his home made Power Smoothies and Awesome Fuel Bars. Lily hits the ice with an Olympic gold-medal hockey player and finds out what happens when you try to run on empty. Will the right snack get her back on track? Lily and Avery head back to the kitchenfor a batch of the ultimate, high- octane meal: a new take on traditional spaghetti & meatballs.

programme.title: Foods that Crunch
programme.desc: It's crunch time! Lily fights soggy cereal witha crunchy batch of her very own granola and learns the history behind crunchy breakfast cereals with History Buff. Avery visits an apple orchard, where he meets an apple expert and learns how apples get from the tree to your local grocery store. Avery and Lily team up to make homemade oven-baked chips, and use their Crunch-o-meter to find out which kind of healthy chip is the King of Crunch!

programme.title: Playback
programme.desc: Ghost Girl, a bounty hunter who works for SOL Technologies, holds an interview with two reporters recounting all the events that have transpired concerning the evil Knights of Hanoi and the mysterious Playmaker.

programme.title: An Invitation
programme.desc: Ghost Girl challenges Yusaku to a Speed Duel with some heavy stakes. If she wins, she gets to capture Ai. If Yusaku wins, he gets a window into SOL's server to learn more about the incident that still haunts him.

programme.title: Blippi The Musical
programme.desc: Blippi The Musical brings the lively Blippi from the screen to the stage in an exciting live show. Recorded in Nashville, TN, the performance features 14 songs, including favorites like "Do the Blippi Dance," "Brush Brush Your Teeth," and "Monster Truck." Your Blippi fan will enjoy learning about the world while singing and dancing along with this special show. There's so much to explore—it'll make you want to sing and shout!

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: The Alfea Natural Park
programme.desc: Faragonda shows Roxy and the Winx the Alfea Natural Park, which she created to welcome the last specimens of Fairy Animals in the Magic Dimension. These species of animals are now free to live away from predators thanks to a magic barrier that can be crossed only by who has fairy powers... but, unexpectedly, an evil bird of prey enters the park. The Winx can't do anything about it and, although transformed, can't stop the bird of prey from abducting the last specimen of Digmole.

programme.title: Young Fairies Grow Up
programme.desc: Faragonda is concerned: as each Fairy Animal has a special talent, they need to solve the mystery of the Digmole. The Winx and Roxy receive from the headmistress the Stones of Memories to travel back in time: only in this way, they will be able to save the Digmoles from extinction and discover the secret they keep. The girls find out that in the Alfea in the past, Fairy Animals and fairies used to live in very close contact with each other. Then, the Winx meet young Faragonda, whose Digmole has just run away: they then decide to help Faragonda to find her animal to carry out their mission.

programme.title: The Berry Bitty Dance Disaster
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some “groove booties” programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Doggie Dance No-Show
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Foods that Grow
programme.desc: Ready Set Grow! With a garden's worth of greenery, Avery grills up a batch of veggie burgers. Lily heads into the field to unravela mystery: how do greenhouses help veggies grow in winter (Psst. The secret is right under your feet). Then our duo discovers a funny thing about tomatoes – they're actually fruit! And avocados are actually berries! Turn them into dip and discover a delicious treat.

programme.title: Foods that Stick
programme.desc: Lily's coming unglued! Can Matt help her find the fix for chicken fingers that stick to the pan? Avery tackles the art of making Japanese sticky rice at a sushi restaurant. But, when the octopus sushi gives him the willies, will he be able to stick to the task? Our hosts really bond when they compete to see who can make the stickiest snacks. With all this fun, you'll want to stick around!

programme.title: Grandma's Glasses
programme.desc: Sid explores his sense of vision, and discovers that even though Grandma's glasses make things look blurry to him, they make things look clear to her.

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: JillianTubeHD
programme.desc: Join YouTube star, JillianTubeHD, as she makes everything from delicious desserts to gold, glittery slime!

programme.title: Toys and Colors
programme.desc: Toys and Colors teaches kids life skills, letters, numbers, and more – all in a fun and family-friendly way!

programme.title: Akili and Me
programme.desc: Rhino doesn't like bread. Rhino doesn't like bananas. Rhino doesn't like juice. Rhino likes... rice!

programme.title: Akili and Me
programme.desc: Bush Baby loves his brothers and sisters. Happy Hippo loves her sister too. Little Lion loves his whole family. And Akili loves YOU!

programme.title: Wow I Never Knew That
programme.desc: Learn how a pharmacist and an accountant created the most famous drink in the world, COCA COLA! And, learn the "BEAR" truth behind how a U.S. president helped create everyone's favorite stuffed toy, THE TEDDY BEAR! Then, how did a piece of wire accidentally "SLINK" its way to become a fantastic fun toy for children? Plus, how a the WIFFLE BALL was invented.

programme.title: Wow I Never Knew That
programme.desc: Before computer drawing programs, there was a toy that if you mastered its two circular white knobs you could have a picture perfect SKETCH. We'll explain how the ETCH A SKETCH drew onto the scene. And what did Neil Armstrong REALLY say when he stepped on the moon, the "aahh" answer will surprise you! Plus, where did the explosive name BIKINI come from?

programme.title: The Shadownsters
programme.desc: Solomon and Gretta are ready to get some sleep. When their father switches off the light, Gretta falls asleep and Solomon, very scared, tries to hide under the sheets. Suddenly, he hears a weird noise. Solomon is frightened and calls Pancho, his reliable plush, who comes to life and helps him to discover a terrible monster, a Shadownster.

programme.desc: KIDZ BOP, the #1 Music Brand for Kids

programme.desc: The hilarious adventures of Bubble Bip, a video game hero who slings bubbles at sassy squids, and the zany group of Earth kids he makes friends with.

programme.title: Pop It!
programme.desc: "Pop It!" interactive dance-along TV series for kids age 6 to 11 that offers fun, exercise and entertainment.

programme.title: Limon and Oli
programme.desc: Sweet little Limon and her rambunctious friend Oli look for snow monsters, hunt for treasure, learn to play musical instruments and more.

programme.title: Masha and the Bear: Bon Voyage / Trading Places Day
programme.desc: What does it take to turn a regular journey into a great trip? One Bear, one travelling bag and... One Masha. However, they are not meant to travel very far together... / The Bear recalls his past accomplishments in circus and recreates some of his signature tricks on a unicycle. Unfortunately, he trips and falls on his head. Suddenly everything about him starts to suspiciously resemble Masha and her childish behavior.

programme.title: Sid the Science Kid: Sid's Amazing Lungs!
programme.desc: Sid races around his room and finds himself breathing really fast. Sid then wonders where all the air is going in his body when he breathes in? At school, Sid and his friends discover that our bodies have lungs to help us breathe in oxygen!

programme.title: Pirata and Capitano: Mussel Soup a la Roberto
programme.desc: Two ingredients are crucial for Robertos legendary Mussel Soup, Roberto-Style: blue Gouzi leaves and mussels from Skull Island.

programme.desc: Nick has a brilliant idea to have a Midsummer celebration. Everyone agrees happily. Each undertakes a responsibility. / Lizzy invites her friends over to celebrate her birthday.

programme.desc: Hey Happy Campers! Today at Happy Camper Live, we are learning penny tricks, honing our basketball skills, and strumming on the guitar! Join us for an exciting day of camp fun!

programme.title: Todd World: Dirt Day
programme.desc: Todd and his friends feel sorry for Vark who's missing their holiday Dirt Day, but soon discover Vark is celebrating a different and equally enjoyable holiday of his own.

programme.title: Blippi Wonders: Fireworks / Shark's Teeth / Elephants
programme.desc: Penny the Pinwheel, takes Blippi & TABBS up into the night sky and explains to them all about how fireworks get their beautiful colors, and also about firework safety. Remember, "Stay safe and give 'e

programme.title: Construction Site: Loud and Clear
programme.desc: Everybody's reversing warning is clear and impressive – everyone's except Scooch that is.

programme.title: Boing: The Play Ranger: Foolish, not Coolish
programme.desc: The Play Rangers are teaching the playville kids how to ride a bike.

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon: Lazido / Big Game
programme.desc: Do you think being lazy is easy? No, it's not! Laziness is a real sport! Tommy the Dragon is going to make Mandy and Andy lazido champions. / What is fair play? Mandy knows the answer: it's when she wins. Tommy & friends go to a place where everyone is taught to win, by any means.

programme.title: Counting With Paula: Catch That Ball
programme.desc: The children decide to enter a ball game in the Jungle, but Tim doesn't want to let Chalky play, as he is clumsy. Will they be able to sort out their differences in time to face the Monkey Team, which

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane: The Story of The Elephant Bird
programme.desc: Nelson the Elephant feels like a change - he wants to be a bird. With help he takes to the air.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Garden Gnome Party
programme.desc: Norman turns down an invitation to a garden gnome party because he can't dance the Big Jig.

programme.title: Nature Knows with the Gumboot Kids: Wind
programme.desc: Join Scout, Daisy, Jessie and the Gumboot Kids as they learn about wind.

programme.title: GoGo Dino Explorers: The Long-Necked Brachiosaurus
programme.desc: The Gogo Dino Explorers come across Mrs. Bracky the Brachiosaurus in a meadow. Mrs. Bracky has a toothache, and the Professor will need anesthesia to help treat her. It is up to the Gogo Dinos to find the right herbs in the forest for making anesthesia.

programme.title: HeyKids: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss in Boots is a classic fairy tale about a cat who uses trickery to gain power, wealth, and the hand of a princess in marriage for his master.

programme.title: TuTiTu Animals: Baboon / Squirrel / Crab / Penguin
programme.desc: In this episode, TuTiTu is building a Baboon Toy, in which the kids can learn about the Baboon and its surrounding, all through a fun Peekaboo game.

programme.title: Bichikids: Ti-Ti the Butterfly
programme.desc: Enjoy, dance, sing and learn with Bichikids' best songs.

programme.title: The Chocolix: An Uncle Who Brings the Party / Goodventure Camp / The Chocobeard Treasure Part 1
programme.desc: Uncle Show appears at the Chocolix family home, and they were all in need of one of his chocolaty adventures. However, he soon tells them he's just passing through, because he needs to go help his friend, the King of Dreamland, who has a serious problem: the Children in his kingdom are having nightmares every night because of a spell that the Bitter Witch placed on them. Chocolyne recalls that if she still had the wish stone that Uncle Show had given her, they could solve the problem. But she gave the stone to her Fairy friend Flowery. Uncle Show has the idea of asking Flowery for help, and the Fairy faces her first mission: to spray the antidote-potion, prepared by the Master Fairy, over the children's houses. / The school children go to a holiday camp. There they compete in several competitive games. For this they decide to divide into two teams: boys versus girls.At the height of the competition, the children realize they have a problem and that the only alternative to solve it is to unite. They overcome the problem and remain united for the rest of the holiday. / Caramel's grandmother tells her and her friends Chocolyne, Chocomark and Max, the legend of pirate Choco Beard, who buried a valuable treasure in some corner of the Kingdom of Chocoland, putting several traps so that no one was able to find it. After hearing the story, the children get excited about the idea of looking for the treasure. During the search, they end up slipping into a deep hole where they finally come across the treasure, but can't get out. Concerned about the delay of their children, their parents go out looking for them. Sweetcookie, using her acute sense of smell, finds the children and is hailed as a hero.Part of the treasure is used to build a children's library and a giant Ferris wheel in the Chocoland square.

programme.title: Zoomoo Lost!: Flash and the Lions
programme.desc: Flash crash lands in Africa and is in danger of becoming dinner for some hungry lions.

programme.title: Ruby & Bonnie: The Best Stories About How Important it is to Wash Your Hands by Ruby and Bonnie

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: As a mother of seven, Chelle T has seen it all, and shes not afraid to joke about it. Quippy and honest, Chelle T talks about how children are raised differently these days, menopause, being married for twenty-three years, and how desperate you sometimes become when youre a mom in this special.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes.
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time . . . two things she subsequently gave up for her goal weight.

programme.title: Joe Devito
programme.desc: Joe DeVito's dead-on timing and unexpected twists make him a favorite at comedy clubs across the USA. His TV appearances include The Late Late Show, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central, Comics Unleashed, and AXStv's Gotham Comedy Live. He's also a regular on TV news panels, finding the funny in pop culture and current events. Joe's albums First Date with Joe DeVito and Three's Comedy are in regular rotation on SiriusXM radio.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Former high school football coach and drama teacher, Marty Simpson jokes about how to punish teenagers, getting rid of 500 bats in his attic, and how his love language is sarcasm.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Steve Bruner looks like a perfectly normal guy—until he opens his mouth. He's delivered his laser-sharp humor on Comedy Club Network (Showtime), An Evening at the Improv (A&E), Into the Night (ABC), and The Byron Allen Show (NBC), to name a few.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBSís Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience donít act funny, be funny... donít worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes on TVONE. BETíS One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayanís TBSís Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamyís Who Got Jokeís Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 ñ Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Plastic Cup Boyz
programme.desc: Joey Wells, Will Spank Horton, and Na'im Lynn take the stage in this comedy special taped at the House of Blues in San Diego.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Keith Robinson
programme.desc: Keith Robinson brings his in-your-face style to everything from the moment he stopped liking his own son to the real reason why Obama was elected.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: Chris Porter Ugly and Angry
programme.desc: Last Coming Standing alum, Chris Porter, gives his look on drugs, growing old, womens fashion, and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: Snakes on a Train
programme.desc: Under a Mayan Curse, snakes are hatched inside a young woman, devouring her from within. With hours for her to live, she jumps on a train to Los Angeles to find a shaman, trapping the passengers aboard

programme.title: Air Collision
programme.desc: When a solar storm wipes out the air traffic control system, Air Force One and a passenger jet liner are locked on a collision course in the skies above the midwest.

programme.title: Izzie's Way Home
programme.desc: A constantly picked-on aquarium fish escapes her yacht home, unaware of the dangers that await her in the open ocean. With the help of other misfit sea creatures, she learns not only how to brave the perils of the deep, but how to be true to herself.

programme.title: War of the Worlds 2: The Next Wave
programme.desc: Two years after a devastating alien invasion, George Herbert (C. Thomas Howell), a scientist working for the U.S. Army, discovers that the extraterrestrials are planning to attack the planet again, this time by constructing a space-time hole between Earth and Mars. But Herbert is distracted when the Martians abduct his son. As the nations of the world come together to conduct a mission to Mars and defend their planet from another invasion, Herbert fights to get his child back.

programme.title: Day the Earth Stopped, The
programme.desc: Hundreds of massive intergalactic robots appear in all of the major world capitals with an ultimatum: Prove the value of human civilization or be destroyed.

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: Bloodwork
programme.desc: When college students sign up for the testing of a new drug, they find themselves fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Mozart and the Whale
programme.desc: The budding romance between two people with Asperger's syndrome is threatened by their emotional dysfunctions.

programme.title: My Mom's New Boyfriend
programme.desc: Henry Durand (Colin Hanks) is a young FBI agent who is given a difficult assignment: spy on his mother (Meg Ryan) and her boyfriend (Antonio Banderas) who is suspected of leading a gang of art thieves.

programme.title: American Yakuza 2: Back to Back
programme.desc: After an ex-cop (Michael Rooker, "Guardians of the Galaxy") finds himself caught up in a battle between Japanese mobsters and local thugs, he discovers that he was framed by a corrupt cop.

programme.title: Arachnia

programme.title: Transsiberian
programme.desc: A Transsiberian train journey to Moscow becomes a thrilling chase of deception and murder.

programme.title: The Adventurers

programme.sub-title: Johnson, Nixon & Vietnam: Reversal of Fortune

The betrayal by Richard Nixon.

programme.title: Oliver Stone's The Untold History of The United States: The Untold History Of The United States

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Michael Bublé
programme.desc: Caught in the Act is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Bublé. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert. The concert featured a few guest artists, including Laura Pausini, Chris Botti, and with an unexpected comedic banter with Bublé, Josh Groban.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: One of the Seven Natural Wonders of the World—all other great wilderness areas are compared to this vast savannah. Wildlife numbers are awesome, but nothing like the numbers of the great migration. Journeys places you in the midst of this natural phenomenon where predator and prey are on a march for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: The name alone conjures up mysterious and exotic images. The architecture and backstory to this once powerful independent kingdom, is both amazing and horrifying. Outside the city, Zanzibar earns its “Spice Island” nickname due to the huge plantations that grow everything to make your cooking flavorful. Journeys final stop is to visit the highly endangered Red Colobus monkeys. Learn why these human-like primates eat dirt for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Safari 101: Tips for a Successful Adventure
programme.desc: All the essentials for going on, and having a successful safari are covered before our host gets a very special challenge—to find at least half of the “Big Twelve” on one safari drive. Four hours and six (6) very special animals—can he do it using his own rules for a successful safari?

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: Nicknamed the Garden of Eden, this volcanic caldera is home to over 25,000 big game animals. Here survival isn't just a game—it's a matter of life and death. You'll witness one of the great acts of nature—buffalo, lion and hyena in a face-to-face struggle for dominance. Life in the crater can take surprising twists.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: Nairobi is the capital of Kenya and one of the most fascinating cities in Africa. On our visit we'll see the colonial architecture of a bygone era and the ultra-modern side of town as well. We'll learn the truth behind the “Out of Africa” story and our host gets eye-to-eye with some endangered giraffes.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: This is definitely the land of the elephant. Large herds of pachyderms roam this marshy park putting on a show for whoever wants to watch. But that's not the only big boys of this park—buffalo, lion and a host of hoofed game make this a wonder to behold.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Kilwa Kisiwani: The Swahili King of the Indian Ocean
programme.desc: This ancient ruined city, lost to history, was one of the most powerful in the world during its prime. The architectural sophistication and sheer size will amaze. Then Journeys heads out to the deep ocean for some big game fishing. Will we land the big one or return empty handed?

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: Featured in films and documentaries, the mane-less lions of Tsavo have a fierce reputation – man-eaters. Journeys embarks on a photo hunt for these legendary beasts of the bush. In the process, we witness the raw power of the ghosts in the dark.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Mombasa: The Center of it All
programme.desc: Gold, ivory and slaves drove the economy of the East coast of Africa 500 years ago. Join us as we explore the Portuguese and Arab roles in these horrific trade schemes. We'll also investigate the pristine waters off the coast of the nearby National Park where our host dons a snorkel mask and comes face-to-face with the creatures of the coral reef.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Arusha/Manyara: Hidden Wonders of the North
programme.desc: The Great Rift Valley is actually where the continent of Africa is literally tearing itself apart. It's a geologic phenomenon where one side is a rainforest full of colorful birds and strange monkeys and the other, a large lake centered on a vast plain. Two bordering eco-zones…double the wildlife.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Great Cities of Tanzania: Countdown to History
programme.desc: To this day sisal, a rope making fiber plant, is a mainstay of the economy. Journeys tours the capital city of Tanzania and its diverse religious institutions before heading into sisal country. We'll learn about the German influences and the seldom heard story of Livingstone's final trip across Africa.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.sub-title: Saadani National Park: The History The Land and The Sea
programme.desc: This is one of the few national parks in Africa where the bush meets the ocean. The big game of Africa face off with the creatures of the deep. Our host goes a little rogue for supper and tries his hand at surf netting prawns after spending a day looking for the elusive elephants of Saadani.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: Are you worth a Dam? Suspended high over a dam is a 350-foot long tightrope with flags attached. Contestants would have to cross the tightrope and collect flags while holding on to a higher tightrope for support. The two men and the two women to collect the most flags in 5 minutes would advance to the next round. Stunt 2 is a real Bee. The ones left are covered with over 200,000 honeybees. Once covered, they would have stand for 2 minutes covered in bees. All contestants who completed this stunt would advance to the finals. For the finale, contestants are locked inside a Plexiglas box full of holes and submerged underwater. Once a red light came on, they would have to figure out which of 2 keys unlocked the coffin and swim to the surface. The contestant to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.4
programme.desc: Get ready to witness the mistakes and mischiefs of our wild friends

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.5
programme.desc: Birds of a feather flock together

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the worlds hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Justice By (Re)design
programme.desc: Necessary rethinks and ambitious yet achievable solutions for redesigning systems to work for all people, not just some. 1) The power of citizen video to create undeniable truths | Yvette Alberdingk Thijm 2) How America's public schools keep kids in poverty | Kandice Sumner 3) The US can move past immigration prisons -- and towards justice | César Cuauhtémoc García Hernández 4) How data-driven journalism illuminates patterns of injustice | Alison Killing

programme.title: Revolutionary Women!
programme.desc: What happens when purpose and passion overshadow fear? Follow in the steps of these outstanding women who let their ferocity, fortitude and wisdom guide them in living -- and speaking -- their truth. 1) On tennis, love and motherhood | Serena Williams and Gayle King 2) The woman who stared at the sun | Alex Gendler 3) The trauma of systematic racism is killing Black women. A first step toward change... | T. Morgan Dixon and Vanessa Garrison 4) How women will lead us to freedom, justice and peace | H.E. Ellen Johnson Sirleaf

programme.title: School Smarts
programme.desc: Learn something new with these amazing educators as they give enlightening lessons on what's needed to make learning fun and school cool (as in accessible, effective and better overall). 1) The board game getting kids excited about school | Joel Baraka 2) Technology can't fix inequality -- but training and opportunities could | 'Gbenga Sesan 3) Can stereotypes ever be good? | Sheila Marie Orfano and Densho 4) Sex education should start with consent | Kaz 5) The power of creative constraints - Brandon Rodriguez 6) How can we support the emotional well-being of teachers? | Sydney Jensen

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Get to know yourself a bit better with this collection of thought-provoking ideas. 1) The new political story that could change everything | George Monbiot 2) The psychology of inequality and political division | Keith Payne 3) The psychological traits that shape your political beliefs | Dannagal G. Young 4) Do politics make us irrational? | Jay Van Bavel 5) 3 kinds of bias that shape your worldview | J. Marshall Shepherd

programme.title: How The Brain Works
programme.desc: How does the brain -- a 3-pound snarl of nervous tissue -- create inspired inventions, the feeling of hunger, the experience of beauty, the sense of self? Researchers at the edge of science explain. 1) Seeing things that aren't there? It's pareidolia | Susan G. Wardle 2) How we're reverse engineering the human brain in the lab | Sergiu P. Pasca 3) How do you explain consciousness? | David Chalmers 4) Could your brain repair itself? - Ralitsa Petrova 5) Can I have your brain? The quest for truth on concussions and CTE | Chris Nowinski

programme.title: Did You Know ... ?
programme.desc: Are you as smart as these brilliant minds? Find out. You may learn a thing or two. 1) Why do we have crooked teeth when our ancestors didn't? | G. Richard Scott 2) The myth of Icarus and Daedalus - Amy Adkins 3) Who owns the "wilderness"? | Elyse Cox 4) Where do werewolves come from? 5) The Egyptian myth of the death of Osiris | Alex Gendler 6) Why do you get a fever when you're sick? | Christian Moro 7) Why do animals form swarms? - Maria R. D'Orsogna 8) The myth of the Sampo— an infinite source of fortune and greed | Hanna-Ilona Härmävaara 9) How do ventilators work? | Alex Gendler 10) Why are human bodies asymmetrical? - Leo Q. Wan 11) The Chinese myth of the white snake and the meddling monk | Shunan Teng

programme.title: The Creative Zone
programme.desc: What makes us create and innovate? Here, wildly creative thinkers share ideas and insights into what kindles genius. 1) For the love of fangirls | Yve Blake 2) A librarian's case against overdue book fines | Dawn Wacek 3) First person vs. Second person vs. Third person | Rebekah Bergman 4) The secret to scientific discoveries? Making mistakes | Phil Plait 5) The AI-powered tools supercharging your imagination | Bilawal Sidhu 6) The secret to being a successful freelancer | Paco de Leon
